title: Throw Tomato!
description: Ever wanted to throw tomatoes at your friends in Minecraft? Now you can. This pack replaces the trident with a big, juicy tomato. That’s it 🍅. This texture pack will only work with Optifine or other mods that support CEM.
body:
Tired of the same old tridents? This texture pack swaps them out for something a little more... flavorful. Now every trident is a bright red tomato, ready to be hurled at anything (or anyone) in your way.

It’s the same mechanics you know—just way more entertaining. Whether you're defending your base or just starting a spontaneous food fight, this pack adds a bit of fun to your gameplay, especially with friends.![Throwing tomato and zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0ff0dd760fbe179354d27aa927bf8eb65c7f1c4.png)
